summary: Phase 5 completed by expanding the live-demo and broker-reconciliation contracts to full operational specs, adding write_live_attach_manifest, write_runtime_summary, write_runtime_heartbeat, detect_live_runtime_anomalies, and run_broker_reconciliation to the Goblin control surface, and verifying all five live-demo behaviors with 10 targeted tests. Live-demo evidence is no longer self-referential: heartbeat anomaly detection surfaces chaos conditions, and the broker reconciliation pipeline independently verifies EA audit against external broker account history.
